name: Choco-Lowfat Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup HERSHEY'S cocoa or EUROPEAN Style cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease muffin cups (2-1/2 inch diameter) with paper baking cups or line with parchment.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, granulated sugar, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add yogurt, skim milk, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Stir until just combined—do not overmix.
5. Fill each muffin cup about 2/3 full with batter.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow muffins to cool slightly in the pan on a wire rack before removing them.
8. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the tops of the muffins, if desired.
9. Serve warm and store leftovers covered at room temperature or freeze in an airtight container for longer storage.
